description: Letter from Abūn b. Ṣadaqa, Jerusalem, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Abūn conveys a detailed tale of a serious falling-out with another merchant and urges Nahray not to associate with him. Abūn describes his reclusive lifestyle in Jerusalem (v25–30) and mentions in passing that he fell sick (r7–8).
tags: Nahray B. Nissim, Illness, illness: mention, trade, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: מכתב מאבון בן צדקה, ירושלים, לנהריי בן נסים, פוסטאט. מספר על סכסוך עסקי חמור ועל אורח חיים מסוגר.
